Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_IssuePaychecks_t: When enabled, online players accrue hours and receive a paycheck once they reach the threshold.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_HoursUntilPayche: Real-time hours a player must be online (counted hourly) before a paycheck is issued.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_PaycheckValue_to: Amount of primary currency credited per paycheck.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_PayZombieBounty: Pay a random bounty for dead zombies
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_PayZombieBounty_: When enabled, killing a zombie has a chance to credit the killer with a bounty in primary currency. Vehicle kills do not pay.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_ZombieBountyChan: Percent chance per zombie kill that a bounty is paid out.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_ZombieBountyMinA: Smallest possible bounty payout (primary currency) when a bounty roll succeeds.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_ZombieBountyMaxA: Largest possible bounty payout (primary currency) when a bounty roll succeeds.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_AllowPlayerTrans: When enabled, players can right-click another player nearby to send them money. Disable to lock the right-click submenu.
Sandbox_SurvivorEconomy_PlayerTransferMa: Maximum tile distance between sender and recipient for an in-person transfer. Re-checked server-side.
